query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multabench: benchmarking multimodal tabular learning with text and ima" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the same core domain of multimodal learning (combining text and visual data) and addresses the specific challenge of integrating tabular-structured information (via "Visual Tables") into multimodal reasoning, which is directly relevant to extending a benchmark focused on "Multimodal Tabular Learning."
